title: Dobrý voják Svejk
writer: Jaroslav Hasek, Václav Wasserman, Václav Spilar
actors: Karl Noll, Antonie Nedosinská, Karel Lamac
plot: Svejk is a dog trader Prague. He is charged for lèse-majesté, "injured majesty" and is supposed to be jailed. But the court finds him to be dim-witted, and he is committed to a mental asylum. There, the doctors examine his physica...
